---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What's the underlying user/operator problem? (Don't lead with the
solution — describe the gap first.)

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If you have a specific design in mind, sketch
it; otherwise describe the desired outcome and let the maintainer
propose an approach.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you think about? Why is the proposed solution better?

## Scope

Lolday is a **deploy platform, not a development platform** (see
[`docs/architecture.md`](../../docs/architecture.md) §1.2). Feature
requests that ask the platform to expose detector-author hyperparameter
knobs, threshold overrides, or other "tune the model from the UI"
controls are typically out of scope — those belong in the detector
authors' own repositories.

## Additional context

Links to related discussions, prior art, or other repositories that
do something similar.
